resources.string: What are you thankful for today?
Add a few so you have something to pray through.
Breathe in on the first phrase, out on the second, paced by the pulsing circle. Three minutes is plenty; finish earlier if you want.
Each mode is a different way to pray — quick breath prayers, guided walkthroughs, voice-recorded reflections, and more. Pick whatever fits your moment.
Fixed-hour prayer: Morning, Midday, Evening, or Compline. We\'ll load the matching office; follow along and pray at your own pace.
Four movements over a short passage of Scripture: read, meditate, pray, contemplate. We\'ll pick the verse — you bring the stillness.
Good job! Keep up the faithful practice.
Ignatian 5-step prayerful review of the day
Ignatius\' five-step review of the day: gratitude, awareness, reflection, sorrow, and hope for tomorrow. One prompt at a time.
Incredible session! Your dedication is inspiring.
Inhale and exhale a short sacred phrase
Modes are grouped into Quick, Guided, Expressive, and Traditional shelves. Swipe a shelf to see more — there\'s always more than one way to approach God.
No prayers in this collection yet
or create a collection to add your own.
Pick a list to focus this %1$s session — or just pray your general list.
Pick any mode. You can switch anytime.
Prayer practices from traditions you didn\'t select — tap to try.
Swipe each card after you\'ve prayed for it. Right for \'I prayed\', left to skip. Great when you have 2 minutes and a long list.
Tap any mode card to begin. You\'ll pick which prayers to focus on next — your own list, a group, or a general time with God.
Tap each bead as you pray through it. Pick Rosary, Jesus Prayer rope, or Anglican beads — the sequence guides you.
Tap the microphone and pray out loud. We\'ll transcribe your words so you can review or edit them before saving.
Thanks for praying today. Every prayer matters.
There\'s no wrong choice. Start in one mode today, try another tomorrow — every session earns XP and keeps your streak alive.
Write freely about what\'s on your heart. Use the mic button for voice-to-text when typing feels like too much.
\\"%1$s\\" doesn\'t have any prayer items yet.
You\'ll see one name or request at a time for 30 seconds. Pray for each, then tap Next to move on. Fast, focused intercession.
You\'ll walk through four steps — Adoration, Confession, Thanksgiving, Supplication — about a minute each. Write a sentence or two for each, or just pray silently.
Your default list — quick way to pray without picking a specific scope
Your general list is empty. Browse the Library for pre-written prayers,
A simple, concrete resolve: one thing you\'ll do, ask for, or let go of tomorrow.
Admit struggles and shortcomings. Where do you need grace?
Ask for help and guidance. What are your needs?
Ask the Spirit for light to see your day honestly.
Before reviewing, invite God to show you what he sees.
Express love and praise to God. What attributes of God inspire you most?
Full experience arrives in Sprint 3. For now, tap below to log a brief moment of prayer.
Give thanks for blessings. What has God provided?
How will you meet tomorrow with Christ?
Lord, help me see today the way you see it…
Lord, I want to say back to you…
Name anything you want to bring under Christ\'s mercy — without shame, without minimizing.
Now speak back to God — your response to what he\'s shown you.
Read the passage slowly, once or twice. Let the words sit on your tongue. Which word or phrase shimmered?
Sit in silence. No more words. Let God simply be with you.
Start here. Notice one or two gifts from today, big or small.
Swipe a card right to pray — at least one is required to finish.
Swipe right to pray → | Swipe left to skip ←
Tap the microphone and speak your prayer. Your words will be transcribed.
The word that caught my attention was…
This morning I… / Around midday… / Tonight I…
This word reminds me of… / It asks me…
Three minutes with the Lord. Well done.
Tomorrow, with God\'s help, I will…
Turn that word or phrase over in your mind. Why this one? What memory, question, or image does it stir?
Walk through your day with God.
Where did you feel close to God? Where did you drift? Where were you loved, and where did you love?
Where did you miss the mark today?
Write freely about what\'s on your heart today. This is your sacred space.
Your prayer text will appear here...
KJV text for this reference will appear here in the next update.
Take a slow breath. On the inhale, whisper this name. On the exhale, rest in its meaning.
Organize prayers by family, work, or any theme
Try a different word, or clear the search to browse everything.
We couldn\'t load this answered prayer. It may have been reactivated or removed.
We couldn\'t load this name. It may have been removed or updated.
We couldn\'t load this prayer. It may have been removed or updated.
Add your first prayer to this collection
Any context or Scripture to pray into…
Create a collection to organize related prayers together. Name is required to continue.
No other prayers yet — create one above.
Stays private to this device. Never shared.
Each pause logs a new gratitude.
\\"Give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God\'s will for you in Christ Jesus.\\" — 1 Thessalonians 5:18
Monthly photo limit reached (%1$s). Keep logging without photos, or upgrade for unlimited.
Rapid-fire gratitude — 60 seconds, bonus XP if you hit 5.
Start logging daily gratitude to see them here
Tap a chip or hold the mic to begin
Tap a chip to log instantly
Try clearing a filter or searching a different keyword.
Your gratitude will be rendered on a warm card with a verse overlay, date, and PrayerQuest watermark.
Auto-advance is off. Tap to turn on.
Auto-advance is on. Tap to turn off.
\\"crisis line\\" plus your country name will usually surface a local
If you need to reach a person, a list of helplines.
If you\'re in danger or thinking about harming yourself, these organizations may help. Tap to call.
If you\'re not in the US, UK, or Australia, a short web search for
Short passages to read slowly. Swipe to advance.
Slowly turn the page every 45 seconds
Take your time. Nothing here is scored.
The Jesus Prayer, at a slower cadence. 3 minutes.
Three minutes with the Lord. You can stay as long as you like.
All members of this group will see this prayer and can pray for it together.
Anything the group should know as they pray...
Ask a group admin for the invite code
Connect and pray with your faith community
Create a new prayer group or join an existing one to start praying with others
Create a new prayer group to share and pray with others. A unique invite code will be generated automatically.
Free accounts can create up to %1$s prayer groups. Upgrade to Premium to create up to %2$s.
• Groups are invite-only for privacy and community
Keep personal / sensitive details light — everyone in this group will see this.
remove every member, prayer, and piece of activity.
• See how many members have prayed for each request
• Share group prayers with all members
Share prayers with your faith community
Sign in to share prayer groups
Sign in with Google to create and join prayer groups that sync across devices and with other members.
You\'ll be the group admin and can invite others using the share code.
You\'ll no longer see prayers from \\"%1$s\\"
You\'re Not In Any Groups Yet
Praise God! My prayer \\"%1$s\\" was answered.
Praise God! Your prayer was answered.
Advent, Christmas, Lent, Easter, Ordinary Time — Catholic/Anglican/Lutheran calendar.
Any amount counts — even three minutes of honest prayer moves mountains.
Create one now, or jump straight into the app
Great Lent, Pentecostarion, Nativity Fast — Eastern Orthodox calendar.
No seasonal banners — keep the Home screen plain.
nudge you. Everything is adjustable later.
One moment, one person, one blessing
Over the next few steps we\'ll set up your prayer rhythm together —
Pick any that speak to you
regardless — traditions just shape the defaults.
Skip — take me into the app
Skipping is fine — you can start your gratitude log any time from Home.
Start your gratitude catalogue right now (optional)
Tap Next below to create this list, or skip and add lists later from inside the app.
This tunes which prayer modes appear first. You can enable any mode later
We\'ll surface seasonal packs and the day on Home
We need permission to send prayer reminders.
Your gentle companion for a deeper prayer life
your name, daily goal, how you like to pray, and when you\'d like us to
Your personal prayer list — add the people and things on your heart
A prayer to begin my journey with PrayerQuest
Gratitude opens our hearts and reminds us of life\'s blessings.
Great job taking this prayer journey.
Name one thing related to this prayer that you\'re grateful for today.
Speaking our prayers aloud helps us internalize them and connect more deeply with our faith.
Take a deep breath and speak this prayer with intention and sincerity.
Take a moment to reflect on this prayer intention and what it means to you.
This prayer is an opportunity to grow closer to what matters most.
Why does this prayer matter to you? What do you hope to achieve or feel through it?
Writing helps clarify our intentions and deepens our spiritual reflection.
You can now add this prayer to your collection.
A few minutes with God can transform your whole day.
A grateful heart is a peaceful heart.
Begin today with gratitude and faith.
Don\'t let today pass without prayer.
Finish strong - pray before the day ends.
Gratitude opens the heart - what\'s yours?
Keep your streak alive with one prayer session.
New challenges are ready to complete.
Notifications for prayer reminders and streaks
Reflect on today\'s gifts and blessings.
Share your gratitude and spread joy.
Start your day with prayer and peace.
Start your quest journey for extra rewards.
Take a moment to connect with what matters most.
Take a moment to count your blessings.
Today\'s quests await you - earn rewards!
Unlock rewards by finishing today\'s quests.
What are you thankful for today? 🌟
Your prayers are heard and valued.
Your streak is waiting for you!
Choose when PrayerQuest nudges you to pray. Each slot has its own tone.
Deletion failed: %1$s. Please try again or contact nathan@5catsgamestudios.com.
Fine-tune which modes appear in your Mode Picker. Per-mode choices override tradition defaults.
Not signed in. Sign in via Prayer Groups to manage your account.
only cloud data is removed.\n\nThis action cannot be undone.
Pause notifications during this window. Reminders silently skip.
Pick any that speak to you — shapes which prayer modes appear first.
Show the current liturgical day on Home and surface seasonal packs.
This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data from Prayer Groups.
This will permanently delete your account, remove you from all Prayer Groups, and delete your shared prayer requests from the cloud.
You are about to permanently delete your PrayerQuest account.
You will be removed from all Prayer Groups and your shared prayers will be deleted.
Your local prayer data (journal, gratitude entries, progress) will NOT be affected —
Ad-free · Unlimited gratitude photos · Larger prayer groups
Attach as many photos as you want to Gratitude entries and Answered Prayer testimonies. Free tier caps at %1$s/month.
Buy us a coffee — every gift fuels more prayer.
He is faithful. Support PrayerQuest\'s growth while you grow yours.
No banners, no interstitials, no app-open ads. Just prayer.
Subscription auto-renews monthly at the price shown. Cancel anytime in Google Play. Restored automatically on reinstall.
Thank you for helping us build PrayerQuest. Manage your subscription anytime in Google Play.
Unlock every feature and support a faith-first habit app.
Up to %1$s members per group (free: %2$s), create up to %3$s groups (free: %4$s), and pick any custom emoji.
Add a photo to this prayer
